problem.passage:
7. Read the passage and follow the directions.【2 points】
At a high school English writing contest, contestants
were given the instructions in the box and completed their
compositions.
Listen to a taped radio interview of Barbara Carrel,
a famous writer, about her adventure to Africa. While
listening, take notes. Then using the notes, write a
story about her adventure. You will be given 30
minutes to complete the story.
Each contestant’s composition was evaluated by two
English teachers using the same rating scale. Below is part
of the two teachers’ scoring results.
Ratings of Contestants’ Compositions
Students Criteria Teacher A Teacher B
Content 2 5
Giho Organization 1 4
Vocabulary 3 4 Lim
Grammar 2 5
Content 3 1
Bomi
Organization 5 1
Cho
Vocabulary 4 2
*1=lowest 5=highest ↔
Complete the comments on the situation above by filling in each
blank with ONE word. Write your answers in the correct order.
The procedure used in the contest exemplifies ①
testing in terms of the number of skills assessed. One potential
problem with the scoring process is low ②
reliability, which is most likely due to the subjectivity of the
raters.

_extraction.note: 자동 추출 초안. passage/meta/answer 모두 수동 보완 필요.
